_comment: Example state.json showing one fully-populated trial (NCT05094336 / AMG 193 / anvumetostat). Not the production file — for schema review only.

conditions: Head and Neck Squamous Cell Carcinoma

n.qualifier: active doses only (800 mg QD, 1200 mg QD, 600 mg BID)

tier_b_claims.subset: all tumour types at active doses

mentions.verbatim: Among those receiving an active dose, the objective response rate (ORR) was 21.4%, with responses observed in both pancreatic and biliary tract cancers.

tier_b_claims.notes: Distinct from 12.8% all-comers ORR (5/39) which includes sub-therapeutic doses. Do not conflate the two figures.

tier_b_claims.subset: all tumour types at active doses

mentions.verbatim: The median duration of response was 8.3 months at the active dose levels, with a disease control rate of 54.8%.

display.orr_tooltip_template: {value} ORR at active doses ({n.qualifier}; n={n.count}; 95% CI {ci_95}); responses across 8 tumour types incl. NSCLC, PDAC, BTC; mDOR 8.3 months. {sources.0.source_key} (T{sources.0.tier}). {notes}
display.search_keywords: nct05094336 amg 193 anvumetostat advanced mtap-null solid tumors mtapestry 101 amgen

NCT05094336.scope_rationale: MTA-cooperative PRMT5i (mechanism); Phase 1/2 (phase); Active not recruiting and presented data at ESMO 2024 (activity window).

out_of_scope.name: First-in-Human Phase 1 Study of GSK3326595 in Subjects With Advanced or Recurrent Solid Tumors and Non-Hodgkin's Lymphoma (METEOR-1)
out_of_scope.reason: First-generation non-selective PRMT5i; completed 2021; not MTAP-selected enrolment criterion. Included in mechanism context (Section 2) but does not satisfy the MTAP-axis activity-window criterion. Cited as historical reference only.

synthesis_figures.claimed_text: ~92% ORR in 12 MTAP-deleted RAS-mut PDAC patients
synthesis_figures.notes: Single-arm, n=12, non-peer-reviewed. Display must include all three caveats.

competitive_cards.positioning: FIH responses across multiple tumour types; NSCLC dose expansion; MTAPESTRY 101 now Active, Not Recruiting.
competitive_cards.catalysts: Expanded NSCLC dose-expansion readout (WCLC 2024); PARP and chemo combination cohort data; biliary-tract / PDAC follow-up.
